proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have higher mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have higher mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have higher mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have higher mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have higher mean pfs_months than those who do not.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have higher mean pfs_months than those who do not.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by treatment_enzalutamide: mean(treatment_enzalutamide=1)=3.728 vs mean(treatment_enzalutamide=0)=3.755, diff=-0.0263, t=-1.428, p=0.1534
PFS by treatment_abiraterone: mean(treatment_abiraterone=1)=3.740 vs mean(treatment_abiraterone=0)=3.746, diff=-0.0056, t=-0.285, p=0.7757
PFS by treatment_docetaxel: mean(treatment_docetaxel=1)=3.732 vs mean(treatment_docetaxel=0)=3.749, diff=-0.0172, t=-0.876, p=0.381
PFS by treatment_olaparib: mean(treatment_olaparib=1)=3.829 vs mean(treatment_olaparib=0)=3.735, diff=0.0943, t=2.940, p=0.003294
PFS by treatment_lu177_psma: mean(treatment_lu177_psma=1)=3.741 vs mean(treatment_lu177_psma=0)=3.745, diff=-0.0041, t=-0.161, p=0.8723
PFS by treatment_pembrolizumab: mean(treatment_pembrolizumab=1)=3.805 vs mean(treatment_pembrolizumab=0)=3.741, diff=0.0638, t=1.488, p=0.1369

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with mcrpc=1 (metastatic castration-resistant) have lower mean pfs_months than those with mcrpc=0.
Patients with visceral_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those without visceral_mets.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those without liver_mets.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those without bone_mets.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher gleason_score is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).

analyses.result_summary: PFS by mcrpc: mean(mcrpc=1)=3.509 vs mean(mcrpc=0)=4.031, diff=-0.5211, t=-28.855, p=1.58e-181
PFS by visceral_mets: mean(visceral_mets=1)=3.706 vs mean(visceral_mets=0)=3.754, diff=-0.0477, t=-2.114, p=0.03452
PFS by liver_mets: mean(liver_mets=1)=3.743 vs mean(liver_mets=0)=3.744, diff=-0.0017, t=-0.065, p=0.9479
PFS by bone_mets: mean(bone_mets=1)=3.753 vs mean(bone_mets=0)=3.742, diff=0.0111, t=0.491, p=0.6235
PFS vs ecog_ps: Pearson r=-0.3885, p=0
PFS vs gleason_score: Pearson r=-0.0031, p=0.4857

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher psa_ng_ml is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher pfs_months (positive correlation).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher pfs_months (positive correlation).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).

analyses.result_summary: PFS vs psa_ng_ml: Pearson r=-0.1532, p=3.484e-260
PFS vs ldh_u_l: Pearson r=-0.0167, p=0.0001808
PFS vs albumin_g_dl: Pearson r=0.1226, p=1.466e-166
PFS vs alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: Pearson r=-0.0121, p=0.006626
PFS vs hemoglobin_g_dl: Pearson r=-0.0102, p=0.02252
PFS vs crp_mg_l: Pearson r=-0.0030, p=0.5073
PFS vs nlr: Pearson r=0.0025, p=0.5773
PFS vs weight_loss_pct_6mo: Pearson r=-0.1427, p=9.911e-226

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with brca2_mutation=1 have different (likely higher with PARP-eligible context) mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with ar_v7_positive=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those who are AR-V7 negative.
Patients with msi_high=1 have higher mean pfs_months than those who are msi_high=0.
Patients with psma_high=1 have higher mean pfs_months than those who are psma_high=0.
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those without tp53_mutation.
Patients with pten_loss=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those without pten_loss.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by brca2_mutation: mean(brca2_mutation=1)=3.835 vs mean(brca2_mutation=0)=3.734, diff=0.1005, t=3.085, p=0.002048
PFS by ar_v7_positive: mean(ar_v7_positive=1)=3.734 vs mean(ar_v7_positive=0)=3.747, diff=-0.0126, t=-0.554, p=0.5797
PFS by msi_high: mean(msi_high=1)=3.778 vs mean(msi_high=0)=3.743, diff=0.0350, t=0.651, p=0.5151
PFS by psma_high: mean(psma_high=1)=3.752 vs mean(psma_high=0)=3.732, diff=0.0202, t=1.096, p=0.2732
PFS by tp53_mutation: mean(tp53_mutation=1)=3.746 vs mean(tp53_mutation=0)=3.743, diff=0.0031, t=0.168, p=0.8665
PFS by pten_loss: mean(pten_loss=1)=3.764 vs mean(pten_loss=0)=3.743, diff=0.0207, t=0.495, p=0.6206

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among brca2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib is associated with higher pfs_months than no olaparib (positive subgroup effect).
Among brca2_mutation=0 patients, treatment_olaparib has little or no effect on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months: olaparib's benefit is larger in BRCA2-mutated patients.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by olaparib in BRCA2-mutated subgroup: mean(treatment_olaparib=1)=5.216 vs mean(treatment_olaparib=0)=3.671, diff=1.5455, t=11.353, p=3.954e-27
PFS by olaparib in BRCA2-WT subgroup: mean(treatment_olaparib=1)=3.668 vs mean(treatment_olaparib=0)=3.742, diff=-0.0734, t=-2.344, p=0.01909

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation', data=df).fit()  # interaction: treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Olaparib × BRCA2 interaction: interaction coef=1.6188, p=4.331e-61

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with higher pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Among msi_high=0 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab has little or no effect on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by pembrolizumab in MSI-H subgroup: mean(treatment_pembrolizumab=1)=3.527 vs mean(treatment_pembrolizumab=0)=3.792, diff=-0.2652, t=-1.187, p=0.2385
PFS by pembrolizumab in MSI-stable subgroup: mean(treatment_pembrolizumab=1)=3.814 vs mean(treatment_pembrolizumab=0)=3.739, diff=0.0749, t=1.715, p=0.08639

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * msi_high', data=df).fit()  # interaction: treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab × MSI-high interaction: interaction coef=-0.3401, p=0.1528

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among psma_high=1 patients, treatment_lu177_psma is associated with higher pfs_months than no lu177_psma.
Among psma_high=0 patients, treatment_lu177_psma has little or no effect on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_lu177_psma × psma_high interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by lu177_psma in PSMA-high subgroup: mean(treatment_lu177_psma=1)=3.743 vs mean(treatment_lu177_psma=0)=3.754, diff=-0.0110, t=-0.337, p=0.7359
PFS by lu177_psma in PSMA-low subgroup: mean(treatment_lu177_psma=1)=3.737 vs mean(treatment_lu177_psma=0)=3.731, diff=0.0064, t=0.159, p=0.8739

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_lu177_psma * psma_high', data=df).fit()  # interaction: treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high
analyses.result_summary: Lu177-PSMA × PSMA-high interaction: interaction coef=-0.0174, p=0.7365

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among ar_v7_positive=1 patients, treatment_enzalutamide has lower (or no) benefit on pfs_months compared with ar_v7_positive=0.
Among ar_v7_positive=1 patients, treatment_abiraterone has lower (or no) benefit on pfs_months compared with ar_v7_positive=0.
There is a negative treatment_enzalutamide × ar_v7_positive interaction on pfs_months (less benefit in AR-V7+).
There is a negative treatment_abiraterone × ar_v7_positive interaction on pfs_months (less benefit in AR-V7+).

analyses.result_summary: PFS by enzalutamide in AR-V7+ subgroup: mean(treatment_enzalutamide=1)=3.719 vs mean(treatment_enzalutamide=0)=3.744, diff=-0.0244, t=-0.588, p=0.5567
PFS by enzalutamide in AR-V7- subgroup: mean(treatment_enzalutamide=1)=3.731 vs mean(treatment_enzalutamide=0)=3.757, diff=-0.0268, t=-1.303, p=0.1925
PFS by abiraterone in AR-V7+ subgroup: mean(treatment_abiraterone=1)=3.757 vs mean(treatment_abiraterone=0)=3.724, diff=0.0324, t=0.724, p=0.4688
PFS by abiraterone in AR-V7- subgroup: mean(treatment_abiraterone=1)=3.736 vs mean(treatment_abiraterone=0)=3.751, diff=-0.0152, t=-0.690, p=0.49

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_enzalutamide * ar_v7_positive', data=df).fit()  # interaction: treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive
analyses.result_summary: Enzalutamide × AR-V7 interaction: interaction coef=0.0025, p=0.9572

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_abiraterone * ar_v7_positive', data=df).fit()  # interaction: treatment_abiraterone:ar_v7_positive
analyses.result_summary: Abiraterone × AR-V7 interaction: interaction coef=0.0476, p=0.3342

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, and gleason_score, treatment_olaparib remains associated with higher pfs_months overall.
After adjusting for the same prognostic variables, treatment_pembrolizumab remains associated with higher pfs_months overall.
After adjusting for the same prognostic variables, treatment_lu177_psma remains associated with higher pfs_months overall.
After adjusting for the same prognostic variables, treatment_docetaxel remains associated with higher pfs_months overall.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + gleason_score', data=df).fit()  # focal: treatment_olaparib
analyses.result_summary: Adj olaparib effect: coef=0.1121, p=3.411e-05

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + gleason_score', data=df).fit()  # focal: treatment_pembrolizumab
analyses.result_summary: Adj pembrolizumab effect: coef=0.0313, p=0.4157

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_lu177_psma + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + gleason_score', data=df).fit()  # focal: treatment_lu177_psma
analyses.result_summary: Adj lu177_psma effect: coef=0.0059, p=0.7955

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_docetaxel + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + gleason_score', data=df).fit()  # focal: treatment_docetaxel
analyses.result_summary: Adj docetaxel effect: coef=-0.0144, p=0.4186

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with lower pfs_months (negative correlation).
Patients with insurance_type='medicaid' have lower mean pfs_months than patients with insurance_type='private'.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have lower mean pfs_months than urban patients.
Patients with race_ethnicity='black' have different mean pfs_months than 'white' patients.
Higher education_years is associated with higher pfs_months (positive correlation).

PFS black mean=3.741 vs white mean=3.741, diff=-0.0005, p=0.9868
PFS vs education_years: Pearson r=-0.0037, p=0.4024

Patients with copd=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those without COPD.

Patients with hiv_positive=1 have lower mean pfs_months than HIV-negative patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In ecog_ps=0 patients, treatment_docetaxel is associated with higher pfs_months than no docetaxel.
In ecog_ps=2 patients, treatment_docetaxel does NOT improve pfs_months (potentially harmful in poor PS).
There is a negative treatment_docetaxel × ecog_ps interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by docetaxel in ECOG=0: mean(treatment_docetaxel=1)=4.661 vs mean(treatment_docetaxel=0)=4.690, diff=-0.0287, t=-0.914, p=0.3605

In mcrpc=1 patients, treatment_abiraterone is associated with higher pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_enzalutamide × mcrpc interaction on pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_abiraterone × mcrpc interaction on pfs_months.

Higher systolic_bp_mmhg is associated with higher pfs_months.

After adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, the treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction remains positive and significant on pfs_months.
After adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, the treatment_lu177_psma × psma_high interaction remains positive and significant on pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: AR-V7+ patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 derive less benefit from treatment_enzalutamide than AR-V7- patients without prior chemo (negative three-way interaction).
Among ar_v7_positive=0 AND prior_chemotherapy=0 patients, treatment_enzalutamide is associated with higher pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_enzalutamide * ar_v7_positive * prior_chemotherapy', data=df).fit()  # interaction: treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive:prior_chemotherapy

proposed_hypotheses.text: Olaparib's PFS benefit in BRCA2-mutated subgroup is greater than 1 month.
Pembrolizumab's PFS benefit in MSI-high subgroup is greater than 1 month.
Lu177-PSMA's PFS benefit in PSMA-high subgroup is greater than 0.5 months.

analyses.code: BRCA2+ subgroup t-test PFS olaparib vs not

analyses.code: MSI-H subgroup t-test PFS pembrolizumab vs not

analyses.code: PSMA-high subgroup t-test PFS lu177 vs not

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable model including clinical features and treatments, ecog_ps remains a strong negative predictor of pfs_months.
In a multivariable model, ldh_u_l remains a negative predictor of pfs_months.
In a multivariable model, albumin_g_dl remains a positive predictor of pfs_months.
In a multivariable model, mcrpc remains a negative predictor of pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + crp_mg_l + nlr + age_years + gleason_score + psa_ng_ml + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab', data=df).fit()  # focal: ecog_ps
analyses.result_summary: Multivariable: ecog_ps: coef=-1.1518, p=0

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + crp_mg_l + nlr + age_years + gleason_score + psa_ng_ml + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab', data=df).fit()  # focal: ldh_u_l
analyses.result_summary: Multivariable: ldh_u_l: coef=-0.0005, p=9.097e-61

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + crp_mg_l + nlr + age_years + gleason_score + psa_ng_ml + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab', data=df).fit()  # focal: albumin_g_dl
analyses.result_summary: Multivariable: albumin_g_dl: coef=0.4798, p=0

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + alkaline_phosphatase_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl + crp_mg_l + nlr + age_years + gleason_score + psa_ng_ml + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab', data=df).fit()  # focal: mcrpc
analyses.result_summary: Multivariable: mcrpc: coef=-0.3714, p=0

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among BRCA2-mutated AND chemo-naive (prior_chemotherapy=0) patients, treatment_olaparib gives largest PFS benefit.
Olaparib × BRCA2 interaction effect remains positive and significant after adjusting for prior_lines_of_therapy.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by olaparib in BRCA2+/chemo-naive: mean(treatment_olaparib=1)=5.034 vs mean(treatment_olaparib=0)=3.612, diff=1.4214, t=7.888, p=4.795e-14

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation + prior_lines_of_therapy', data=df).fit()  # interaction: treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation
analyses.result_summary: Adj olaparib × BRCA2 interaction (controlling prior lines): interaction coef=1.6196, p=3.8e-61

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients matched to a targeted therapy by their biomarker (BRCA2+olaparib, MSI-H+pembrolizumab, or PSMA-high+lu177) have higher mean pfs_months than non-matched targeted-therapy recipients.
The benefit of targeted therapy in the biomarker-matched group remains after adjustment for ecog_ps and mcrpc.

analyses.code: matched (biomarker-matched targeted Tx) vs mismatched among targeted-therapy recipients
analyses.result_summary: Matched mean PFS=3.873, Mismatched mean PFS=3.716, diff=0.1573 months, p=2.793e-05, n_matched=5046, n_mismatched=8613
Adjusted matched-vs-mismatched: coef=0.1484 months, p=1.062e-05
